sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74158" key="o)nomatourgi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀνομᾰτ-ουργία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n74158.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the making of names,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg009:p.44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.44</biblScope> </bibl> P.</sense> </entryFree>
